data.name: Project: WATERFALL
data.detailed_description:
PROJECT: STELLAR GIRLS


Project: Mirror


關於此遊戲

Welcome to the game Project: WATERFALL! Here you are the protagonist who draws lines to the heart of cute and beautiful girls in a fantasy world. Pass a lot of levels and get a hundred achievements. Have fun playing!

Project: WATERFALL is a casual puzzle game whose main gameplay is to get water to the right place using simple drawing skills.



Gameplay:


Make your way through the many levels. To do so, you need to use simple drawing skills. The game includes many interesting levels. There is also a lot of romantic music, a lot of interesting scenes that open up as you go through the game.

Game Features:


  • Lots of levels
  • Nice music
  • Beautiful images in your gallery
  • Easy gameplay

data.supported_languages: 英文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 俄文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1 / 8.1 / 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3-4330 / AMD Ryzen™ 3 1200 or higher
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 750 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1 / 8.1 / 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3-4330 / AMD Ryzen™ 3 1200 or higher
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 750 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows 7 SP1 / 8.1 / 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i3-4330 / AMD Ryzen™ 3 1200 or higher
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 750 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • OS *: Windows 7 SP1 / 8.1 / 10 / 11 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel® Core™ i3-4330 / AMD Ryzen™ 3 1200 or higher
  • Graphics: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 750 Ti or higher
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
